hooks.command: mkdir -p .claude && echo "结束: $(date '+%m/%d %H:%M')" > .claude/session-state.md && echo "Wiki: $(ls 05-resources/llm-wiki/wiki/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ')篇 | Outputs: $(ls 05-resources/llm-wiki/outputs/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ')篇" >> .claude/session-state.md && echo "---" >> .claude/session-state.md && echo "Outputs:" >> .claude/session-state.md && ls 05-resources/llm-wiki/outputs/ 2>/dev/null >> .claude/session-state.md && echo "" >> .claude/session-state.md && echo "Log:" >> .claude/session-state.md && tail -5 05-resources/llm-wiki/log.md 2>/dev/null >> .claude/session-state.md && echo "" >> .claude/session-state.md && echo "提醒: 有新知识产出？运行 /summary" >> .claude/session-state.md
osascript -e 'display notification "本次对话有新知识产出吗？若有请运行 /summary" with title "Claude 会话结束" sound name "Glass"'

mkdir -p .claude && echo "压缩: $(date '+%m/%d %H:%M')" > .claude/session-state.md && echo "Wiki: $(ls 05-resources/llm-wiki/wiki/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ')篇 | Outputs: $(ls 05-resources/llm-wiki/outputs/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ')篇" >> .claude/session-state.md && echo "---" >> .claude/session-state.md && echo "Outputs:" >> .claude/session-state.md && ls 05-resources/llm-wiki/outputs/ 2>/dev/null >> .claude/session-state.md && echo "" >> .claude/session-state.md && echo "Log:" >> .claude/session-state.md && tail -3 05-resources/llm-wiki/log.md 2>/dev/null >> .claude/session-state.md
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude 需要你的操作权限" with title "Claude 权限请求"'
if [ -f .claude/session-state.md ]; then echo '[SessionStart] 上次会话记录:'; cat .claude/session-state.md; else echo '[SessionStart] 首次会话'; fi
if [ -f .claude/session-state.md ]; then MSG=$(head -1 .claude/session-state.md); osascript -e "display notification \"$MSG\" with title \"Claude Code 上次会话\" sound name \"Glass\""; fi
